citation: NCBI GenBank record CP016816: Mycoplasma mycoides JCVI-Syn3A, complete genome.
notes: Authoritative genome sequence + feature table for JCVI-Syn3A. Source for chromosome length, gene coordinates, locus tags, gene names, strand, and product annotations. Different record revisions exist (e.g. CP016816.1, CP016816.2); the latest revision should be pinned and recorded when the file is staged. The existing cell_sim/layer0_genome/syn3a_real.py code expects a GenBank file at cell_sim/data/Minimal_Cell_ComplexFormation/input_data/syn3A.gb.
caveats: We have not yet staged the GenBank file on disk; all derived facts (gene count, chromosome length, locus tags) are pending that staging.
Record version number must be pinned (CP016816.X) when the file is ingested.
